sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ عُمَرُ رَجُلًا عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ.
sentences.translation: Omer je pitao čovjeka za put do muzeja.
sentences.translationEn: Omar asked a man for directions to the museum.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الرَّجُلُ: امْشِ إِلَى الْيَمِينِ ثُمَّ إِلَى الْيَسَارِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek je rekao: Idi desno pa lijevo.
sentences.translationEn: The man said: Go right then left.

sentences.translation: Omer mu je zahvalio i brzo krenuo.
sentences.translationEn: Omar thanked the man and walked quickly.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ بَعْدَ عَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je do muzeja nakon deset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: He reached the museum after ten minutes.
